name: meshy_download_model
description: Download a completed Meshy.ai 3D model and its textures to the Unity project. Only call this after meshy_check_task returns SUCCEEDED. Downloads the model file and any texture maps to Assets/Meshes/Generated/. The asset is imported automatically after download.

task_id.description: The task ID of a SUCCEEDED Meshy task.

source.description: Which API the task belongs to. Default: 'text-to-3d'. Use 'remesh' for meshy_remesh tasks, 'retexture' for meshy_retexture tasks.

format.description: Output format. Default: 'fbx'. FBX is natively supported by Unity. GLB requires a GLTF importer package.

filename.description: Custom filename without extension. Default: auto-generated from the model name or task ID.
